subject: chore(lint): strengthen ESLint config and document all suppressions
body:
- Fixed redundant ecmaVersion in eslint.config.js: removed ecmaVersion:2020
  from languageOptions (conflicted with ecmaVersion:'latest' in parserOptions),
  promoted sourceType:'module' to top level
- Added descriptive -- reason suffixes to all 9 eslint-disable comments:
  4 react-refresh/only-export-components (file-level, with specific export info)
  3 react-hooks/set-state-in-effect (block-scoped, with rationale)
  2 react-hooks/exhaustive-deps (next-line, with explanation)
- Updated CLAUDE.md: added LINTER to Quick Reference, npm run lint to
  Common Commands, ESLint AI Note covering config quirks, version constraints,
  and the -- reason suffix convention for future suppressions

Tags: tooling, lint, dx, docs
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: developer-experience
Semver: patch
